data.content: Plan complete for `loom doctor` command. Key decisions: (1) Add Doctor{fix:bool} variant to Commands enum in main.rs, (2) Create new commands/doctor.rs with version check (reusing update.rs internals made pub(crate)) and shell completions check (detect shell from $SHELL, check common locations), (3) --fix auto-updates loom and installs completions to appropriate shell location. ~150-200 lines of new code across 3 file changes. Medium complexity, main risk is heuristic nature of completion detection.
